user.title: Connect to Enki
user.description: Use the same email and password as the Enki mobile app (Leroy Merlin).

telemetry.title: Help extend Enki support
telemetry.description:
Optional opt-in: when a new or unsupported device is detected on your account, Home Assistant can notify you with a **pre-filled GitHub link** (anonymized profile: type, model, capabilities).

Nothing is sent automatically — you decide whether to open the link. This helps prioritize heaters, shutters, sockets, and other hardware.

You can change this anytime under **Enki → Configure**.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot reach the Enki cloud. Check your network and try again.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid credentials. Verify your Enki app email and password.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check Home Assistant logs.

abort.already_configured: This Enki account is already configured.

data.telemetry: Notify me about new or unsupported devices (anonymized; pre-filled GitHub link only — nothing sent without your click)
